insights.title: Mixed price action, five items on alert
insights.text: 5 of 18 tracked materials moved more than ±3% week-on-week, with the portfolio averaging -0.5% WoW; Rapeseed Extraction (RSM) and DDGS drove the largest swings in opposite directions.

insights.title: Rapeseed Extraction spikes as DDGS and Corn Gluten Feed ease
insights.text: Rapeseed Extraction (RSM) jumped 83.4% week-on-week to $495/MT, the sharpest rise in the portfolio, while DDGS fell 38.0% WoW to $179/MT and Corn Gluten Feed fell 36.6% WoW to $139/MT.

insights.title: China sourcing concentration remains high
insights.text: L-Methionine, Calcium Phosphate, PH Raw Materials, L-Lysine, L-Threonine, Amino Acid (Feed) and Feed Additive are all sourced primarily from China, with L-Lysine carrying a 48.96% cost premium versus India-origin alternatives.

insights.title: Eleven materials flagged for review or high cost
insights.text: Maize/Corn, Soyabean Meal, Soyabean, Animal Feed, Wheat Bran, DDGS, Corn Gluten Feed and Rapeseed Extraction (RSM) all carry a Review signal, while Calcium Phosphate, L-Lysine and Limestone Powder show a confirmed High Cost gap versus alternative origins.

insights.title: Two new materials added with sourcing still unconfirmed
insights.text: Corn Gluten Meal and Sunflower Meal are newly tracked this cycle with no confirmed Akij sourcing country on file yet; both are flagged Monitor pending a supplier decision.
